title: MANGA NGE Question about stage 75
wikitext:
[]: [NGE] Question about stage 75.             Quote Post by kobe » Sun Feb 18, 2007 11:28 am in stage 75 there there is a line: (Fuyutsuki looks over his shoulder at Rei) Fuyutsuki: Lilith's lacking/wanting/deficient/imperfect heart... can anyone tell, what was original Japanese word for "heart"?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Feb 18, 2007 1:00 pm kaketa ririsu (Lilith) no kokoro (heart)

[]:             Quote Post by kobe » Mon Feb 19, 2007 3:06 pm k thx please answer another one question: in stage 34 there is a dialogue between Gendo and Ritsuko while they are looking at dummy plug: "We have transplanted Rei's personal data, but we can't digitize the human heart - the soul" am i right that in this line heart=kokoro and soul=tamashi? also what was the meaning of this line: "we cant digitize kokoro - tamashi" OR "we cant digitize kokoro AND tamashi" ?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Feb 24, 2007 8:46 pm kobe wrote: am i right that in this line heart=kokoro and soul=tamashi?
